state.primary_signal: There is credible pain around missed calls and at least some willingness to pay.
state.primary_risk: The offering appears too customized to deliver repeatably.
state.stage_interpretation: This is more of a delivery and productization problem than a pure demand problem.

recommended_next_experiment.name: standardized missed-call pilot
recommended_next_experiment.goal: Test whether a narrow, repeatable workflow can onboard and retain HVAC customers with minimal customization.
design: Offer the next 3 to 5 prospects the same fixed pilot.
Limit scope to missed inbound calls only.
Use a standard workflow: missed call triggers immediate text-back and lead capture.
Avoid custom logic unless absolutely necessary.
Measure onboarding completion, payment, and 2+ week retention.
success_criteria: At least 2 customers complete onboarding without custom workflow changes.
At least 1 additional customer pays for the standardized pilot.
No churn during the first 2 weeks due to setup complexity.
